steps.title: Read the contrast
steps.content: The delays have challenged the economist's projection, but they will likely only extend its time frame. The blank needs a word meaning to completely nullify or make invalid, because the sentence says the projection is not destroyed entirely.

steps.title: Eliminate weak verbs
steps.content: A means argue against, which delays cannot literally do. B means remove from consideration, which the delays themselves cannot choose to do. C means emphasize, the opposite of weakening the projection. The needed word means nullify. The answer is D.
